title: Rules
subtitle: Rules classify new drives automatically — e.g. “Home → Office, Mon–Fri” as commute.
manualUntouchedNotice: Rules only touch unclassified drives — your manual changes stay untouched.

empty.title: No rules created yet.
empty.hint: Example: start = Home and destination = Office on Mon–Fri → classify as commute. New drives are then sorted in automatically.

applyButton.label: Apply now to all unclassified drives
applyButton.open: {count, plural, one {# drive open} other {# drives open}}
applyButton.applied: {count, plural, one {# drive classified.} other {# drives classified.}}
applyButton.none: No matching drive found — nothing changed.

form.name: Name
form.conditionsHint: All set conditions must match. At least one is required.
form.actionsHint: What happens on a match? At least one action is required.

errors.conditionRequired: At least one condition (start, destination, or weekdays) must be set.
errors.actionRequired: At least one action (classification, tag, purpose, customer, or project) must be set.
